The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Ryuuji
The Takasu Family.description: A stay-at-home dad who always takes great care of his family. He goes to great lengths to ensure that his children are well-fed and his wife comes back from work to a clean home. While the people around him fear the glare from his sanpaku eyes, his children seek comfort in his gentle gaze. Even though his daughters struggle at school and his wife gets stressed from her role as a mother, he continues to work to his strengths, ensuring his meals put bright smiles on their faces.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Taiga
The Takasu Family.description: The breadwinner and matriarch of the family. With her strong fighting spirit and charisma, she became a feisty and wealthy salarywoman to support her family of six, but being a mother has been an absolute nightmare. The fear of where her daughters will be in the future is constantly looming over her, and she feels totally powerless over them, especially with how much bigger they were compared to her. Well, as long as everyone comes home at the end of the day, they'll be fine, right?

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Haruko
The Takasu Family.description: The first and the oldest of the Takasu sisters... by about six minutes. Takasu Haruko is the smartest of the triplets. Well, she isn't that smart, since she's one of the lower performing students of the class. But she's always trying to help her sisters just barely pass their exams. She's also formed a weird antagonistic relationship with her English teacher, since she gets bugged by her the most. It's hard to blame her when she's just doing everything she can to fit in.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Mitsuko
The Takasu Family.description: Compared to her sisters, she's a lot more passive and mellow. While she spends most of her time in her own world, she always tries to be kind wherever she can. She usually finds herself getting between her sisters, while her sisters are always trying to protect her from any threats that come her way. She really, really loves books, so much so that it disrupts her performance in class. While she hides from the scary world outside her books, her wish to share this love of books remains.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Katsuko
The Takasu Family.description: All brawn, no brains. That's what she is. There isn't a better feeling than being stronger than everyone else. But status isn't the reason she became so strong. Her strength helps her knock any obstacles out of her sisters' way. She's the most hostile of the sisters, so nobody dares to mess with her, besides a few outliers. She isn't afraid to get violent as long as it protects the secure triangle the sisters have formed. But at worst, you'll get put six feet under. The only one that can take her on is Haruko, who is always trying to get her study.

The Takasu Family.name: Takasu Yuuchi
The Takasu Family.description: The youngest in the family and an avid gamer. He's in a weird position when it comes to his family. His sisters never stopped treating him like a kid. Especially Katsuko, who's always picking on him. He doesn't find his father very remarkable, and his mother is extremely doting towards him. Now in his second year of junior high, he goes about his life without a care in the world, only needing his video games and gamer friends to keep him company, or so he believes.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Sagawa Kaito
Class 2-C of 2029.description: A young man with the one and only goal to care for the family that his mother and father had worked so hard to build. He studies long hours to maintain his good grades with a part-time job on the side to alleviate his single mother's financial burdens. He's not someone that likes to spend time messing around, nor does he want anyone else's pity, no matter how much sleep he loses. He needs to stay focused to keep anything from falling apart. Unfortunately, after getting thrown into a pair project assigned by Yuri-sensei, one girl would become his biggest distraction: Takasu Haruko.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Ninomae Arisa
Class 2-C of 2029.description: She's always trying to stay true to her own values no matter what, even if it makes herself look a little too serious sometimes. Lightening up isn't easy for her, but as Takasu Mitsuko's best friend, she tries to become someone more fun to be around. At the same time, she helps Mitsuko keep her head out of the clouds.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Kishida Mie
Class 2-C of 2029.description: She's a bit of a pervert and while she likes to act aloof on her own, she's quite perceptive, leading her to be rather antisocial. Drawn in by her passion for (adult) books, Takasu Mitsuko would approach her with the intention of becoming friends, regardless of how many times she would get turned down. Through their bond, they learn to become more open about themselves.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Koigakubo Tarou
Class 2-C of 2029.description: His struggle to speak makes him a really quiet boy. Most of his responses come in the form of a shake or a nod, and any word that leaves his mouth is barely audible. He even has a hard time talking to his own mother. Even though his grades are alright, his lack of sociability leaves more to be desired. That's why he chose to join the student council in hopes of becoming more proactive. His days there wouldn't be easy, but through all his troubles, he'd start to grow closer to Takano Saki, his classmate who would join the council alongside him.

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Takano Saki
Class 2-C of 2029.description: A short and plump girl with a strong will and a heart of gold. In spite of her size, she never holds herself back from achieving big things. The harmony of the classroom amongst all the students in her class is of utmost importance, so she always delivers a big smile to everyone she talks to. She's destined for student council president!

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Yoshida Satoshi
Class 2-C of 2029.description: He's a little aloof and likes hanging around Katsuko (to her dismay).

Class 2-C of 2029.name: Kogarashi Hitomi
Class 2-C of 2029.description: A transfer student with looks that can make all the girls swoon (even Katsuko!). What happened at his old school remains a secret to all his new classmates as he tries to integrate himself into Ohashi High School. Once he feels secure in his new school life, his true character begins to unfold.

Others.name: Koigakubo Yuri
Others.description: A woman in her 50s returning to her teaching job after her son enrolled into the high school she taught at. She also got to keep her family name after marrying.

Others.name: Takasu Yasuko
Others.description: The grandmother to the Takasu sisters. Mitsuko is closest to her!

Others.name: Noto Hisanosuke
Others.description: The child of Noto Maya and Noto Hisamitsu, and Takasu Yuuchi's closest friend/gaming buddy.
